ci_support_linux_64_python3.10.____cpyth:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
pin_run_as_build:
  python:
    min_pin: x.x
    max_pin: x.x
python:
- 3.10.* *_cpython
target_platform:
- linux-64

commands: python -c "import sys,os; print('Python:',sys.version); import svs; print('svs ok', svs.library_version())"

cat > CMakeLists.txt << 'EOF'
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24)
project(test_svs_runtime LANGUAGES NONE)
find_package(svs_runtime REQUIRED)
message(STATUS "Successfully found svs_runtime package")
EOF

name: scalable-vs-packs
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set cf_buildnumber = "0" %} {% set py_tag = "py" + PY_VER|replace('.','') %} {% set intel_ch = "https://software.repos.intel.com/python/conda" %} # gonna have to change these every time we repack new SVS packages # scalable-vs repack info {% set intel_buildnumber = "0" %} {% set build_string = "gc187b54" %} {% set version = "0.3.0" %} {% set sha256_map = { "py310": "181c3e0419d1cd72fa19a6b95e998b7e3432de1a342d8b5dfa86558b44a28c4f", "py311": "f917fc62379487619de8efa59bf54e8329a83c6ed0d4430e962c910b19368b3f", "py312": "c1b3bb283a37d68db731fa739596dc093b697a91dbec7a7a9a13a1bb2147b11d", "py313": "c903763974fc2d56179cf49dae87513bc0577703c69dcdc333f5b4c36b9788c7", "py314": "e43280d0971ea40a2a77d605addc8e5d1380636969850e67f915fc69275be509" } %} # libsvs repack info {% set libsvs_build_string = "gc187b54" %} {% set libsvs_sha256 = "25e910ae66be3b11eb31291642a1ded22ad9d67072039fd671da2432af0e7e41" %} # libsvs-runtime repack info {% set libsvs_runtime_build_string = "gc187b54" %} {% set libsvs_runtime_sha256 = "b4f9b6b6c3cfcd12f326b473048f85d5211f7fa54942474aeae66839f500ecdb" %} # builds off above variables {% set url_string = build_string + py_tag + "_" + intel_buildnumber %} {% set full_build_string = url_string + "_" + cf_buildnumber %} {% set libsvs_url_string = libsvs_build_string + "_" + intel_buildnumber %} {% set libsvs_full_build_string = libsvs_url_string + "_" + cf_buildnumber %} {% set libsvs_runtime_url_string = libsvs_runtime_build_string + "_" + intel_buildnumber %} {% set libsvs_runtime_full_build_string = libsvs_runtime_url_string + "_" + cf_buildnumber %} package: name: scalable-vs-packs version: {{ version }} source: - url: {{ intel_ch }}/{{ target_platform }}/scalable-vs-{{ version }}-{{ url_string }}.conda folder: scalable-vs sha256: {{ sha256_map.get(py_tag, "") }} no_hoist: true - url: {{ intel_ch }}/{{ target_platform }}/libsvs-{{ version }}-{{ libsvs_url_string }}.conda folder: libsvs sha256: {{ libsvs_sha256 }} no_hoist: true - url: {{ intel_ch }}/{{ target_platform }}/libsvs-runtime-{{ version }}-{{ libsvs_runtime_url_string }}.conda folder: libsvs-runtime sha256: {{ libsvs_runtime_sha256 }} no_hoist: true build: number: {{ cf_buildnumber }} binary_relocation: false detect_binary_files_with_prefix: false skip: True # [not linux64] missing_dso_whitelist: - /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 - /lib64/libpthread.so.0 - /lib64/libm.so.6 - /lib64/libdl.so.2 - /lib64/libc.so.6 outputs: - name: scalable-vs version: {{ version }} script: repack.sh number: {{ cf_buildnumber }} build: string: {{ full_build_string }} binary_relocation: false detect_binary_files_with_prefix: false missing_dso_whitelist: - /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 - /lib64/libpthread.so.0 - /lib64/libm.so.6 - /lib64/libdl.so.2 - /lib64/libc.so.6 ignore_run_exports: - python - libgomp requirements: host: - python - conda-package-handling run: - python - numpy - toml - libstdcxx - libgcc - libgfortran5 - libgomp about: home: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html license: Intel Simplified Software License (Version October 2022) license_file: - scalable-vs/info/licenses/distributions/LICENSE - scalable-vs/info/licenses/ScalableVectorSearch/THIRD-PARTY-PROGRAMS summary: Scalable Vector Search description: | LEGAL NOTICE: Use of this software package is subject to the software license agreement (as set forth above, in the license section of the installed Conda package and/or the README file) and all notices, disclaimers or license terms for third party or open source software included in or with the software.

EULA: Intel Simplified Software License (Version October 2022)

dev_url: https://github.com/intel/ScalableVectorSearch doc_url: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html test: requires: - python - numpy - toml commands: - python -c "import sys,os; print('Python:',sys.version); import svs; print('svs ok', svs.library_version())" - name: libsvs version: {{ version }} script: repack_libsvs.sh number: {{ cf_buildnumber }} build: string: {{ libsvs_full_build_string }} skip: True # [not linux64] binary_relocation: false detect_binary_files_with_prefix: false missing_dso_whitelist: - /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 - /lib64/libpthread.so.0 - /lib64/libm.so.6 - /lib64/libdl.so.2 - /lib64/libc.so.6 - $RPATH/libpthread.so.0 - $RPATH/libm.so.6 - $RPATH/libdl.so.2 - $RPATH/libc.so.6 requirements: host: - conda-package-handling run: - libstdcxx - libgcc about: home: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html license: Intel Simplified Software License (Version October 2022) license_file: - libsvs/info/licenses/distributions/LICENSE - libsvs/info/licenses/ScalableVectorSearch/THIRD-PARTY-PROGRAMS summary: Scalable Vector Search library dev_url: https://github.com/intel/ScalableVectorSearch doc_url: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html test: commands: - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libsvs_shared_library.so - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libsvs_static_library.a - test -f $PREFIX/include/svs/leanvec/leanvec.h - name: libsvs-runtime version: {{ version }} script: repack_libsvs_runtime.sh number: {{ cf_buildnumber }} build: string: {{ libsvs_runtime_full_build_string }} skip: True # [not linux64] binary_relocation: false detect_binary_files_with_prefix: false missing_dso_whitelist: - /lib64/ld-linux-x86-64.so.2 - /lib64/libpthread.so.0 - /lib64/libm.so.6 - /lib64/libdl.so.2 - /lib64/libc.so.6 - $RPATH/libpthread.so.0 - $RPATH/libm.so.6 - $RPATH/libdl.so.2 - $RPATH/libc.so.6 ignore_run_exports: - libgomp - _openmp_mutex requirements: host: - conda-package-handling run: - libstdcxx - libgcc - libgomp - _openmp_mutex about: home: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html license: Intel Simplified Software License (Version October 2022) license_file: - libsvs-runtime/info/licenses/distributions/LICENSE - libsvs-runtime/info/licenses/ScalableVectorSearch/THIRD-PARTY-PROGRAMS summary: Scalable Vector Search runtime library dev_url: https://github.com/intel/ScalableVectorSearch doc_url: https://intel.github.io/ScalableVectorSearch/index.html test: requires: - cmake 3.* - make commands: # Validate file installation - test -f $PREFIX/lib/libsvs_runtime.so - test -f $PREFIX/include/svs/runtime/api_defs.h # Validate CMake find_package(svs_runtime) works - | cat > CMakeLists.txt << 'EOF' cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.24) project(test_svs_runtime LANGUAGES NONE) find_package(svs_runtime REQUIRED) message(STATUS "Successfully found svs_runtime package") EOF - cmake . -DCMAKE_PREFIX_PATH=$PREFIX - test -f CMakeCache.txt # pleases the linter about: home: https://github.com/conda-forge/scalable-vs-feedstock license: LicenseRef-IntelSimplifiedSoftwareOct2022 summary: 'Repackaged Intel Scalable Vector Search' extra: feedstock-name: scalable-vs-packs recipe-maintainers: - jharlow-intel - napetrov - mihaic - ethanglaser
